flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Robeson Community College are 15% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($29.0k vs $34.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Robeson Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Robeson Community College fell 38% between 2013 and 2016 ($10.5k → $6.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Robeson Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.6k).
